summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all 3 requested changes for VisaXpert app. All features have been successfully implemented and verified: (1) Dashboard Add Review modal now shows 'Choose Photo' upload button instead of URL input field, (2) Image upload endpoint POST /api/upload/image is working and accepts image files, (3) University Change page 'How It Works' section displays 4 cards in proper alignment without green connection line, (4) University Change page has video section with unichange.mp4 video player, (5) Main Landing page CEO section has sunilarora.mp4 video player with proper controls and CEO information.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and connectivity (21/21 tests passed)
Image upload endpoint POST /api/upload/image exists and responds correctly
Dashboard Add Review modal opens and displays correctly
Photo upload button shows 'Choose Photo' text (not URL input)
No URL input field found in Add Review modal (correctly replaced)
University Change page 'How It Works' section has 4-column grid layout
University Change page shows exactly 4 step cards in proper alignment
No green connection lines found in How It Works section
University Change page video section with unichange.mp4 video player
Video element has proper controls and source attributes
Main Landing page CEO video section with sunilarora.mp4 video player
CEO video has controls and displays Mr. Sunil Arora information
All page navigation and responsive design working
WhatsApp and call button integrations working

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and user requirements verified)
